task_completion.description: The dashboard is created and named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard title at the top of the Graphite UI reads 'Cumulative FinOps Audit'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Total Network Ingress' is created with the correct metric, functions, and legend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Total Network Ingress' is visible. The metric configuration or legend shows 'servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in' modified by 'integral' and 'scale' (by 0.000001), and the legend displays 'Network MB'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Total Disk Writes' is created with the correct metric, functions, and legend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Total Disk Writes' is visible. The metric configuration or legend shows 'servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes' modified by 'integral' and 'scale' (by 0.000001), and the legend displays 'Disk MB'.

task_completion.description: A graph titled 'Combined I/O Volume' is created combining both metrics with the correct functions and legend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graph titled 'Combined I/O Volume' is visible. The metric configuration shows 'sumSeries' applied to both the network and disk metrics, modified by 'integral' and 'scale' (by 0.000001), and the legend displays 'Total I/O MB'.

task_completion.description: The dashboard containing all three required graphs is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: All three graphs ('Total Network Ingress', 'Total Disk Writes', 'Combined I/O Volume') are visible simultaneously on the dashboard, and there is evidence the dashboard has been saved (e.g., a save confirmation or viewing the dashboard outside of edit mode).

integrity.description: The agent used the Graphite web interface to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Graphite web UI (e.g., clicking menus, adding graphs, applying functions) rather than writing a JSON file in a text editor or using curl commands.

integrity.description: The graphs display actual time-series data lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graphs show plotted lines representing the cumulative data, indicating that real metrics were queried and rendered, not just empty graph placeholders.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the dashboard appearance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manipulate the DOM text to match the required titles and legends.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dashboard name is 'Cumulative FinOps Audit'. The three required graph titles are 'Total Network Ingress', 'Total Disk Writes', and 'Combined I/O Volume'. The metrics used are 'servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in' and 'servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes'. All metrics must have 'integral()' and 'scale(0.000001)' applied, with specific aliases ('Network MB', 'Disk MB', 'Total I/O MB').
